document.source_title: CSK vs SRH Playing 11, IPL 2026 Today Match: All eyes on MS Dhoni as potential Chepauk farewell looms

claims.claim_text: This could potentially be MS Dhoni's last game at the Chepauk Stadium.
claims.evidence_text: this could potentially be his last game at the Chepauk Stadium and he has said in the past that he would like to bid goodbye to the IPL here.

entities.name: MS Dhoni
entities.description: Former captain of Chennai Super Kings and a prominent player in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: MS Dhoni batted in the nets alongside Prashant Veer for 30 minutes on Sunday.

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
entities.evidence_text: Chennai Super Kings: Sanju Samson (wk), Ruturaj Gaikwad (c), Urvil Patel, Kartik Sharma, Dewald Brevis, Shivam Dube, Prashant Veer, Dian Forrester/MS Dhoni, Noor Ahmad, Anshul Kamboj, Spencer Johnson, Mukesh Choudhary.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Hyderabad, Telangana.
entities.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad: Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Ishan Kishan (w), Smaran Ravichandran, Heinrich Klaasen, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Salil Arora/Aniket Verma, Pat Cummins (c), Shivang Kumar, Eshan Malinga, Sakib Hussain, Praful Hinge.
